prompt:
Take the FIRST provided reference image (approved step 17 v4 — hand from upper-left lowering the stubby pill-bottle protector tube into the DH-branded zip-seal specimen bag with QR code) and reproduce it PIXEL-FAITHFULLY in every element — same hand from upper-left, same bag silhouette and proportions, same parted zip seal, same DIALED HEALTH bag-front logo (offset diagonal: DIALED top-LEFT + EKG-spike horizontal line + HEALTH bottom-RIGHT), same square QR code, same line-art style on pure white background, same uniform medium-weight black ink line work.

RESTORE THE TUBE PROPORTIONS exactly from this v4 reference: short STUBBY PILL-BOTTLE silhouette. Total tube height ≈ 1.5x diameter — NOT taller, NOT slimmer. Body-to-cap split ≈ 60/40 (white body slightly taller than the black cap). Diameter narrow enough that the hand still dominates but the tube is chunky like a small medicine bottle, NOT a lipstick / pen / slim tube. Pinky-finger to thumb width range. Match the chess-pawn proportions of the v4 reference exactly.

MANDATORY TEXT FIX — both words on the protector tube must be rendered as HORIZONTAL TEXT BANDS (letters upright, reading left-to-right), in OUTLINED LINE-ART style (NOT solid-filled), positioned so the FIRST LETTER of each word sits high on its section:

  • BLACK CAP (top section, pinched by the hand above the zip seal): the word 'DIALED' is embossed as a HORIZONTAL band wrapping around the cap's side wall. Each letter is upright (NOT rotated, NOT sideways, NOT vertical) — D, I, A, L, E, D reading LEFT-TO-RIGHT across the front face of the cap. The band sits POSITIONED HIGH on the cap — close to the top edge of the cap, so the word 'DIALED' (with its first D anchoring the upper-left of the band) reads at the upper portion of the cap. Letters are OUTLINED in thin WHITE strokes against the solid black cap fill (letter outlines visible, letter interior remains black) — line-art embossed treatment, not solid white blocks.

  • WHITE BODY (bottom section, lower portion visible faintly through the translucent bag): the word 'HEALTH' is embossed as a HORIZONTAL band wrapping around the body's side wall. Each letter is upright (NOT rotated, NOT vertical) — H, E, A, L, T, H reading LEFT-TO-RIGHT across the front face of the body. The band sits POSITIONED HIGH on the body — close to the top of the body just below the cap/body seam, so the word 'HEALTH' (with its first H anchoring the upper-left of the band) reads at the upper portion of the body, directly underneath the cap's DIALED band. Letters are OUTLINED in thin BLACK strokes (letter outlines visible, letter interior remains white) — line-art embossed treatment, not solid black blocks.

  • The two bands stack vertically with DIALED-band on top (high on the black cap) and HEALTH-band directly below it (high on the white body). Reading the assembled upright tube top-to-bottom, the eye encounters: DIALED (horizontal text on cap, near top) → cap/body seam → HEALTH (horizontal text on body, near top). Combined sequential reading: 'DIALED HEALTH' top-down.

  • Both words must spell CORRECTLY left-to-right from the viewer's straight-on angle — no mirroring, no upside-down letters, no letters reading right-to-left, no scrambled order. D-I-A-L-E-D and H-E-A-L-T-H, both legible and correctly spelled.

The hand pinches the BLACK DIALED cap above the zip seal; the lower portion of the WHITE HEALTH body sits inside the bag, drawn faintly through the translucent plastic (the HEALTH text on the body is muted to show through the bag but still identifiable as HEALTH).

Do NOT modify anything else — same hand, same bag silhouette, same zip seal, same bag-front DH logo, same QR code, same composition, same line weight, same white background, same line-art aesthetic. The ONLY changes vs the prior regeneration: (1) restore the v4 stubby narrow pill-bottle tube proportions, (2) text is HORIZONTAL bands of upright letters (NOT vertical letter-stacks), (3) text is OUTLINED line-art (NOT solid-filled), (4) DIALED band positioned high on the black cap, HEALTH band positioned high on the white body just below the seam.

No frame, no border, no other labels, no numbers, no arrows.
